attribution.changes: Statements formalized (translated) into Lean 4 by parZer; proofs are conditional on the disclosed sorry-stubs.
attribution.title: Counting the parts divisible by in all the partitions of whose parts have multiplicity less than

license.label: cc-by — full Lean file available under commission

nodes.label: akn
nodes.lean:
def akn (k n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  ∑ p ∈ Nat.Partition.countRestricted n k, (p.parts.filter (fun x => k ∣ x)).card

nodes.label: bk0
nodes.lean:
def bk0 (k n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  (Finset.univ.filter (fun p : Nat.Partition n =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ∣ a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ∣ a → k ∣ p.parts.count a)).card

nodes.label: bk1
nodes.lean:
def bk1 (k n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  (Finset.univ.filter (fun p : Nat.Partition n =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ∣ a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ∣ a → ¬ k ∣ p.parts.count a)).card

nodes.label: ck0
nodes.lean:
def ck0 (k n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  (Finset.univ.filter (fun p : Nat.Partition n =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ≤ p.parts.count a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ≤ p.parts.count a → k ∣ a)).card

nodes.label: ck1
nodes.lean:
def ck1 (k n : ℕ) : ℕ :=
  (Finset.univ.filter (fun p : Nat.Partition n =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ≤ p.parts.count a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ≤ p.parts.count a → ¬ k ∣ a)).card

nodes.label: BSet0
nodes.lean:
def BSet0 (k n : ℕ) : Finset (Nat.Partition n) :=
  Finset.univ.filter (fun p =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ∣ a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ∣ a → k ∣ p.parts.count a)

nodes.label: BSet1
nodes.lean:
def BSet1 (k n : ℕ) : Finset (Nat.Partition n) :=
  Finset.univ.filter (fun p =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ∣ a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ∣ a → ¬ k ∣ p.parts.count a)

nodes.label: CSet0
nodes.lean:
def CSet0 (k n : ℕ) : Finset (Nat.Partition n) :=
  Finset.univ.filter (fun p =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ≤ p.parts.count a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ≤ p.parts.count a → k ∣ a)

nodes.label: CSet1
nodes.lean:
def CSet1 (k n : ℕ) : Finset (Nat.Partition n) :=
  Finset.univ.filter (fun p =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun a => k ≤ p.parts.count a)).card = 1 ∧
    ∀ a ∈ p.parts.toFinset, k ≤ p.parts.count a → ¬ k ∣ a)

nodes.label: ASet
nodes.lean:
def ASet (k n : ℕ) : Finset (Nat.Partition n × ℕ × ℕ) :=
  (Nat.Partition.countRestricted n k).biUnion (fun p =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun x => k ∣ x)).biUnion (fun i0 =>
      (Finset.range (p.parts.count i0)).image (fun m => (p, i0, m))))

nodes.label: ApSet
nodes.lean:
def ApSet (k n : ℕ) : Finset (Nat.Partition n × ℕ × ℕ) :=
  (CSet0 k n).biUnion (fun p =>
    (p.parts.toFinset.filter (fun x => k ∣ x ∧ k ≤ p.parts.count x)).biUnion (fun i0 =>
      (Finset.range k).image (fun m => (p, i0, m))))

nodes.label: thm_B_to_C
nodes.lean: theorem thm_B_to_C : ∀ (n k : ℕ), 2 ≤ k → (BSet0 k n).card = (CSet0 k n).card ∧ (BSet1 k n).card = (CSet1 k n).card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_blk_4
nodes.lean: theorem thm_blk_4 : ∀ (n k : ℕ), 2 ≤ k → (ASet k n).card + (ApSet k n).card = (CSet0 k n).card + (CSet1 k n).card := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_main
nodes.lean: theorem thm_main : ∀ (n k : ℕ), 2 ≤ k → (bk0 k n = ck0 k n ∧ bk1 k n = ck1 k n) ∧ ((akn k n : ℤ) = (bk1 k n : ℤ) - ((k : ℤ) - 1) * (bk0 k n : ℤ) ∧ (akn k n : ℤ) = (ck1 k n : ℤ) - ((k : ℤ) - 1) * (ck0 k n : ℤ)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_t5_2
nodes.lean: theorem thm_t5_2 : ∀ (n k : ℕ), 2 ≤ k → ¬ k ∣ n → (∑ j ∈ (Finset.Icc (-(n:ℤ)) (n:ℤ)).filter (fun j => 0 ≤ j*(3*j-1)/2 ∧ j*(3*j-1)/2 ≤ (n:ℤ)), (-1:ℤ)^(j.natAbs) * (akn k (n - Int.toNat (j*(3*j-1)/2)) : ℤ)) = 0 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_t5_3
nodes.lean: theorem thm_t5_3 : ∀ (n k : ℕ), Even k → Odd n → (∑ j ∈ (Finset.range (n+1)).filter (fun j => j*(j+1)/2 ≤ n), (-1:ℤ)^(j*(j+1)/2) * (akn k (n - j*(j+1)/2) : ℤ)) = 0 := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_t6_3
nodes.lean: theorem thm_t6_3 : ∀ (n k : ℕ), Even k → Odd n → (akn k n : ℤ) = (∑ m ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.sqrt n), (-1:ℤ)^(m-1) * (akn k (n - m^2) : ℤ)) + (∑ m ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.sqrt (n/2)), (-1:ℤ)^(m-1) * (akn k (n - 2*m^2) : ℤ)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_t6_4
nodes.lean: theorem thm_t6_4 : ∀ (n k : ℕ), Even k → Even n → (∑ m ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.sqrt n), (-1:ℤ)^(m-1) * (akn k (n - m^2) : ℤ)) = (∑ m ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.sqrt (n/2)), (-1:ℤ)^(m-1) * (akn k (n - 2*m^2) : ℤ)) := by sorry

nodes.label: thm_t6_5
nodes.lean: theorem thm_t6_5 : ∀ (n : ℕ), Even n → (∑ m ∈ Finset.Icc 1 (Nat.sqrt n), (-1:ℤ)^(m-1) * (Fintype.card (Nat.Partition (n - m^2)) : ℤ)) = ((Fintype.card (Nat.Partition n) : ℤ) - (Nat.Partition.oddDistincts n).card) / 2 := by sorry

title: Counting the parts divisible by in all the partitions of whose parts have multiplicity less than
